theme.rationale: For a land dealing platform without brokers, building trust is paramount. Earthy tones (Deep Green, Warm Sand) provide a natural, grounded aesthetic. The UI should avoid the 'crypto-bro' or generic 'SaaS blue' looks, favoring an architectural, clean, and organic presentation.

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing.
Labels/Overlines must be uppercase with wide tracking.
No Inter, Roboto, or standard defaults.

spacing_and_layout.containers: Padding must be generous. Cards: p-6 or p-8. Sections: py-24 or py-32.

grids.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Asymmetric span logic.
grids.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Dense 'Control Room' style layout.

borders_and_radius.card_style: 1px solid border (#E8E3D9) with subtle shadow-sm. No muddy heavy drop shadows.

navigation.style: Crystal Glass or Solid Muted Surface
navigation.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border-b border-[#E8E3D9]

buttons.primary: bg-[#2B4A3B] text-white hover:bg-[#1E3329] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors duration-200 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F5F3ED] text-[#1C211F] hover:bg-[#E8E3D9] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors duration-200 font-medium
buttons.outline: border border-[#D1CBBF] text-[#1C211F] hover:bg-[#F5F3ED] rounded-xl px-6 py-3 transition-colors duration-200 font-medium

cards.property: bg-white border border-[#E8E3D9] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

forms.input: bg-white border border-[#D1CBBF] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:border-[#2B4A3B] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2B4A3B] outline-none transition-all
forms.label: text-sm font-medium text-[#59605D] mb-1.5 block

motion.hover: Subtle translate-y-[-2px] for property cards with shadow elevation.
motion.page_load: Fade in and slide up (translate-y-4) for main content blocks.

image_urls.description: Grassy hill with trees, vast open land. Perfect for hero overlay with bg-white/40 glassmorphism box.
Textured background for a subtle noise effect in dark footers or premium sections.
Large white house with tree - minimalist premium property.
Small house atop a grassy hill - remote land.
Calm lake water reflecting pastel sky over land - waterfront plot.

icons.rationale: Lucide matches the clean, architectural aesthetic of the platform.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or 'Open Sans'. Load 'Outfit' (weights 300, 400, 500, 600) for headings and 'Manrope' (weights 400, 500) for body text via Google Fonts.
Implement the UI using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI. Modify Shadcn defaults to match the rounded-xl and earthy border colors specified.
For the Hero section, use the 'hero_background' image with a glassmorphic card for the search/CTA area to ensure text readability.
Dashboards (Admin/Buyer/Seller) must have a sidebar layout (w-64) with a top header. Ensure active state in sidebar uses the primary brand color (#2B4A3B) background with white text.
Property listing cards should display a fixed aspect ratio image (e.g., aspect-[4/3]), clean typography for price, and tiny labels for location/size.
Data grids (Admin panel) should use flat design: border-collapse, subtle horizontal borders, no excessive card shadows.
All forms (registration, add listing) must use Shadcn form elements with custom padding/borders to look premium and touch-friendly.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements as required by the testing guidelines.
